title: hymenostegia afzelii
intro: Hymenostegia afzelii, also known as African breadfruit or breadnut, is a species of flowering plant in the family Olacaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its seeds, which contain a high concentration of starch and have been used to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hymenostegia afzelii include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and provide relief from respiratory issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the seeds are often dried and ground into a powder, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or added to food as a nutritious ingredient.
